title: Garden Route District wildfire update: Aasvoëlberg, Albertinia
description: ALBERTINIA NEWS AND VIDEO - After initial...
bodyText:
Video

ALBERTINIA NEWS AND VIDEO - After initial containment, major flare-ups occurred due to strong storm winds and a sudden wind change from the south-east, causing the fire to re-ignite and spread rapidly.


> Infrastructure is currently under threat. Helicopters have been activated to assist with firefighting operations. A number of rondawels have already been impacted by the fire.


The fire is approaching the N2, which is currently closed at the Aloe Ferox turn-off and the Ysterfontein turn-off. Motorists are requested to remain patient and exercise caution.

If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre at 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193.


> Supplied video (Video: Garden Route District Municipality):


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
